title: Turkish Pretzel Bowl
description: A crunchy Turkish pretzel bowl filled with mildly spiced soft cheese, perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Soft Cheese
ingredients.notes: Mildly spiced with paprika and garlic powder

instructions: Place Turkish pretzel bowl on a baking sheet.
Bake for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Mix soft cheese with mildly spiced mix.
Spread sour cream on top of pretzel bowl.
